Legal Intake Specialist: Complete Guide

A legal intake specialist is the first point of contact for prospective clients at a law firm.

What Does a Legal Intake Specialist Do?

They qualify leads, gather case details, and schedule consultations with attorneys.

Salary and Hiring

Typical salary ranges from $38,000 to $52,000 depending on experience and location.

FAQ

How much does a legal intake specialist make? Around $45,000 on average.
